title: Github 1394 Workspace Define Knowledge Routing And Source Au

execplan_profile.projection_rule: canonical_core is authoritative for intent, scope, next action, proof, continuation, and closeout; legacy fields remain compatibility projections.

canonical_core.requested_outcome: Define the Agentic Workspace knowledge routing and source authority model requested by #1394 so future #1389 slices have a canonical owner for source kinds, authority, triggers, freshness, mirror policy, posture integration, closeout capture, and Memory promotion boundaries.
canonical_core.hard_constraints: Keep this lane to the design and navigation surface for #1394; do not implement runtime routing, connector integrations, broad search, or unrelated module simplification.
canonical_core.agent_may_decide: Choose the smallest canonical documentation surface and nearby package-doc links needed to make the model discoverable through normal docs and future lane planning.
canonical_core.escalate_when: A correct answer requires runtime enforcement, schema changes, or source integrations beyond #1394's design scope.
canonical_core.next_action: Add a package-level source authority design document and wire it into the docs owner map and module posture explanation.
proof_expectations: Run Agentic Workspace implement on the changed docs/planning paths.
Run the narrow docs/lint validation available for documentation-only package changes.
completion_criteria: A canonical package doc defines source kinds, authority classes, route triggers, mirror policy, freshness/staleness, task posture integration, startup/work-shaping, closeout capture, and Memory promotion/demotion.
The docs owner map and package navigation route future agents to that model without broad repo archaeology.
The model explicitly informs #1390 and #1391 while avoiding extra ordinary startup burden.
